sections: Task 2: Apply the canonical contract/dock design freeze
Task 3: Run the complete proof and regression wall
HCM-0.4 crate ownership and dependency contract

repo_truth: The worktree was clean at fc4e19e84385063c1ca3678e730c7d3b9e604ad8 on feat/handbook-contract-membrane before this dispatch. The exact v1.2 entry handoff, ledger parity, three validator modes, packet commit/path/per-file hashes, and aggregate fingerprint validate. HCM-0.4 is completed dependency evidence. HCM-0.9 is abandoned and supplies no authority. Canonical 05 is one monolithic file at pre-edit sha256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d. The live Python handoff validator uses Draft202012Validator. Contract membrane and docks are TargetOnly; runtime proof gates remain open.
allowed_scope: Edit only docs/specs/handbook-contract-membrane/00-README.md through 06-proof-and-regression-ledger.md, and only the HCM-0.5-affected sections authorized by the packet.

Replace preliminary HCM-0.5 contract/dock material with implementation-grade design authority while preserving HCM-0.2, HCM-0.3, and HCM-0.4 semantics byte-for-byte except for narrowly necessary additive HCM-0.5 references outside their frozen sections.
Run targeted read-only checks while editing and return a structured landing result to the parent.
non_goals: No Rust, Cargo, CLI, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, runtime, validator, schema implementation, HCM-0.6 work, HCM-0.9 repair, catalog leaves, compatibility index, or routing engine.
Do not stage or commit. Do not create another dispatch, global handoff, ledger entry, or user task hop.
Do not claim PG-CONTRACT-01, PG-DOCK-01, or PG-GATE-01 passed or promote Contract membrane/External docks beyond TargetOnly.
Do not weaken or redesign frozen HCM-0.4 owner, ordinary-operation, DTO, transport, bridge, or publication contracts.
tasks: Read the required skills in order, replay the four-file authority manifest, and revalidate the selected packet boundary before edits.
Update 00 status/scope and HCM-0.5 design-freeze truth before proof; keep implementation authorization none and runtime gates open.
Tighten 01 owner, validator-as-witness, process-first/future-Rust semantic parity, implementation-bundle/runtime-closure, isolation, and non-goal boundaries.
Add precise contract/claim/evidence/applicability/Resolution/evaluation semantics to 02 without altering HCM-0.3 Resolution/Snapshot/Projection authority.
Update only the Contract membrane and External docks seam rows plus directly coupled high-risk notes in 03, preserving TargetOnly classifications and the monolithic catalog boundary.
Expand the HCM-0.5 Phase-0 row and only directly necessary Phase-5 wording in 04; do not start HCM-0.6.

Replace preliminary Contract record through Dock request/result sections in canonical monolithic 05 with exact field/rule/state/protocol tables and append only the packet-approved HCM-0.4-compatible ordinary operation definitions.
Add an HCM-0.5 documentation-freeze proof gate and coupled regression rules to 06 while keeping PG-CONTRACT-01, PG-DOCK-01, and PG-GATE-01 open.
Run targeted Markdown/fence/link/example/semantic/scope checks and git diff --check; return changed paths, validation results, findings, and any stop condition.
contracts_and_gates: Exact contract definition identity/fingerprint and closed SemVer compatibility; immutable lifecycle records with closed adjacency and separate evaluation state.
Closed claims/applicability and evidence identity/provenance/freshness/all-of per-kind cardinality/precedence/repeated-consistency/six-dimension Resolution semantics.
Closed verdict vocabulary and complete claim partition; gate composition keeps hard-fail and required-not-observed precedence over scores; local closeout and parent promotion are separate.
Dock identity includes exact manifest, content-addressed implementation bundle, normalized bundle manifest, entrypoint digest, and runtime/dependency closure. Host selection confers no authority.

One-shot process JSON uses exact bounded request/result framing, default-deny isolation, unconditional v1 network denial, host monotonic timeout, idempotent cancellation, fail-closed refusal/crash/cleanup, and no partial evidence.
The dock emits untrusted evidence candidates only; Handbook membrane validation admits one immutable evidence record; validator remains witness and cannot emit canonical verdict/gate/contract truth.
Select handbook.dock.json-schema@1.0.0 as a bounded local Draft 2020-12 future proof target without claiming implementation.
Append only packet-approved ordinary operation definitions under frozen HCM-0.4 rules. Keep the canonical 05 monolith and every runtime gate open.
stop_conditions: Stop and return if the authority manifest no longer replays, canonical authority is contradictory, exact first-dock selection would require missing product authority, or safe work requires prohibited scope.
Stop rather than editing HCM-0.2/HCM-0.3/HCM-0.4 frozen semantics, runtime files, HCM-0.6, HCM-0.9, or immutable historical evidence.
Do not write a global handoff or ledger entry; the parent owns review, proof, commit, and closeout.
